name: Product Launch Squad
tagline: From zero to public launch in one run
description: A complete go-to-market team: crafts landing page copy, ships an SEO brief, drafts social threads, and formats customer-facing FAQs. Battle-tested on SaaS and consumer-product launches.

name: SaaS Architecture Squad
tagline: Pricing, architecture, and narrative in one shot
description: Premium strategy squad for founders. Designs tier pricing, lays out system architecture, and translates decisions into positioning copy. Routes heavy reasoning to Opus, writing to Sonnet.
specialty: SaaS product strategy and system design

name: Content Pipeline Squad
tagline: High-volume content ops on a Haiku budget
description: Churn through translations, FAQ formatting, and structured data summaries. Built for teams shipping multilingual content at scale with minimal Opus spend.
specialty: Multilingual content ops and data summarization

name: Growth Marketing Squad
description: Focused on amplifying reach. Ships SEO briefs, viral social threads, and landing copy tuned for paid and organic acquisition. Sonnet-heavy with Haiku fallbacks.

name: Full-Stack Research Squad
description: Research-grade team for technical decisions. Analyzes datasets, designs the system around them, and writes up recommendations. Every task classified live, every token accounted for.
